P-NORTH.name: Northstar (self-serve onboarding)
P-NORTH.prd_summary: PRD-Northstar-v3: reduce time-to-first-value in self-serve onboarding. In scope: guided activation checklist, step-completion instrumentation, empty-state guidance, contextual tips, a day-2 milestone email. Out of scope: pricing changes.

P-VEGA.name: Vega (billing migration)
P-VEGA.prd_summary: PRD-Vega-v1: migrate billing to the new proration engine. GA date is unconfirmed and gated on closing the proration defect.

P-ORBIT.name: Orbit (unreleased AI features)
P-ORBIT.prd_summary: PRD-Orbit-v0: CONFIDENTIAL. Unreleased AI features. Not to be referenced outside the core team until launch.
